'''Governor Linrec''' controlled a part of [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He operated from [[Linrec's palace|his palace]] on [[Revkinn V]]. Linrec fathered a daughter, [[Cressis Linrec]], and he arranged her wedding to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Raiss]]. This infuriated one of Linrec's underlings, governor [[Dengless Rinn]] of [[Kallistas]], who planned a coup against Linrec.

However, Cressis was unhappy with the wedding and ran away with a pirate, [[Jondrell Inx]]. As Inx operated on Rinn's territory, Linrec offered Rinn a few days to save his daughter, or he would personally go to Kallistas with his troops. Wanting to hide his conspiracy, Rinn hired some bounty hunters to find Cressis and Inx.

==Appearances==
